data.title: Trump Considers Options Regarding Federal Reserve Chair
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is exploring the possibility of removing Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. This information was disclosed by Kevin Hassett, the Director of the National Economic Council, during a conversation with reporters. The potential move comes amid ongoing discussions about the Federal Reserve's policies and their impact on the U.S. economy.

data.title: Astar Network Adjusts Tokenomics, Cuts Staking Rewards to Control Inflation
data.description:
TL;DR The drop of ASTR to $0. 02 on April 7 led Astar to cut base staking rewards from 25% to 10% to stabilize APR. Astar raised the variable portion of staking rewards for dApps from 40% to 55%, ties issuance to TVL, and does not affect developers. It set a minimum issuance floor of 2. 5%, maintains. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/astar-network-adjusts-tokenomics-cuts-staking-rewards-to-control-inflation/

data.title: Macro Guru Lyn Alden Predicts ‘Pretty Good Performance’ for Bitcoin Over the Coming Months – But There’s a Catch
data.description:
Popular macroeconomics expert Lyn Alden believes Bitcoin (BTC) will remain bullish over the coming months. In a new interview with Natalie Brunell, Alden says that Bitcoin is likely to trend higher for another year or so.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/18/macro-guru-lyn-alden-predicts-pretty-good-performance-for-bitcoin-over-the-coming-months-but-theres-a-catch/

data.title: Metalpha is suspected of continuing to hoard ETH, with a total withdrawal of 29,000 ETH in 18 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, Metalpha may continue to increase its ETH position. It deposited $25 million USDC to Binance 5 hours ago, and then withdrew 7,000 ETH (about $11.12 million) to the on-chain address 1 hour ago. Since April 1, Metalpha has withdrawn a total of about 29,000 ETH from Binance, with a total value of about $48.73 million, and the average price during the period was about $1,680. The on-chain behavior shows that it continues to build positions within the current price range of ETH.
